name: Global Interactive Technologies, Inc.
business: Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. operates Faning, a global digital fan engagement platform centered on Korean entertainment and culture, including K-pop, designed to support online fan communities, content discovery, user interaction, and multilingual communication across mobile and web-based services.
sellsTo: Global fans of K-pop and Korean culture
Users in Philippines, Indonesia, Thailand, South America, Republic of Korea
Age demographic 20-39, users aged 12 and older

exposures.sentence: Global Interactive Technologies, Inc. ( GITS or the Company ), a Delaware corporation formerly known as Hanryu Holdings, Inc., is a technology-focused platform company operating and developing Faning, a global digital fan engagement platform centered on Korean entertainment and culture, including K-pop.

tamClaims.claim: Number of global Hallyu fans surpassed 225 million as of December 2023 across 119 countries.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Korea Foundation s 2024 Global Hallyu Status Report, the number of global Hallyu fans surpassed 225 million as of December 2023 across 119 countries.

tamClaims.claim: Total export value of Hallyu-related sectors reached $15.18 billion in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the 2025 Overseas Hallyu Status Survey released by the Ministry of Culture, Sports and Tourism and KOFICE in April 2025, the total export value of Hallyu-related sectors reached $15.18 billion in 2024, marking a 4.5% increase compared to the previous year.
